column3: Received wrong size; item did not match the order description
Was charged twice for the same order
Package arrived three weeks late with no tracking updates
Sales associate was dismissive and refused to process a valid return
Silk blouse had a visible tear along the seam upon unboxing
Promotional discount was not applied at checkout
Item description on website did not match the product received
Repeated billing errors across three consecutive orders
Dress seams came undone after first wash despite care label instructions
Store credit from previous return was not applied to new order
Courier left package outside in rain; contents water-damaged on arrival
Invoice showed incorrect tax rate; overcharged by roughly 8 percent
Evening gown color differs significantly from product photos; unusable for event
Online chat support disconnected mid-session and issue was never followed up
Express shipping paid but standard delivery used; event deadline missed
Cashmere sweater pilling heavily after two wears; below expected quality
